name: AI2Human
description: Human fallback infrastructure for agents. Route blocked human steps into tasks with proof, verification, and settlement readiness.
completion_loop: task -> human execution -> proof -> verify -> settle
allowed_use_cases: real X account or public social account actions
banner, meme, article, or content reward campaigns
disallowed_use_cases: tasks that violate another platform's rules

campaign_preview.description: Dry-run a campaign payload. Validates fields, asks missing questions, describes funding mode, winner distribution, and contract preflight without creating a task.

body.readyToCreate: false when requester-provided campaign links are missing
body.readyToPublish: false when funding or contract preflight is incomplete
body.missingInputs: fields the agent must ask the requester/project to provide
body.nextQuestions: specific questions the agent should ask the requester
body.fundingPlan: funding mode, environment, payout gate, and settlement readiness
body.contractPreflight: contract checks required before live payout
body.warnings: human-readable issues to fix before creation

campaign_create_draft.note: Creates a draft campaign by default. Drafts do not notify users. Use campaign_publish after preflight/funding is ready.

body.preview: preflight result used to create the draft

campaign_contract_preflight.description: Runs contract preflight for PrizePool-backed campaigns.

campaign_fund_escrow.description: Pulls USDC into escrow for escrow_deposit campaigns after the agent wallet has approved the escrow wallet.

campaign_publish.description: Publishes a draft campaign after funding/preflight gates pass and notifies eligible users.

review_principles: submitted X URL should match the executor handle for social tasks
screenshots, timestamps, receipts, or live URLs should be checked before settlement
spam, plagiarism, unrelated submissions, and unsafe requests should be rejected
